meaning: n.樱草花,报春花,樱草色,淡黄色adj.樱草的,樱草色的,淡黄色的
examples: Evening primrose oil is used on the skin as well as taken internally.
Thinkers and politicians were among the guests at their home in Primrose Hill, where David still lives.
Entrepreneurs need someone on their team to stop them from wandering down the innovation primrose path.
We are sure Travis fans will agree that without Neil Primrose, Travis are incomplete.
